contribution.title: Startup YC transfer-supported fresh validation packet
contribution.summary: Fresh-agent validated-pack mode improved the 20-case Startup YC absorption suite by +0.0200 mean score, and current Startup YC adapters won 12/12 fresh-validation Startup Bench scenarios across six tracks with mean scenario delta +0.0560.
intended_consumers: Spark agents entering the Startup YC specialization path
Builder agents creating new specialization paths
Autoloop agents evaluating mastery packet promotion

governance.rollback_or_deprecation_rule: Deprecate if full-suite absorption repeat loses positive validated-pack mean delta, fresh validation min delta turns negative, or trap regression appears.

anti_drift.lineage_summary: Startup YC weak cases were diagnosed and focused patches were repeated before this fixture was created.
anti_drift.ghost_improvement_check: The source report compares no-pack, pack, and validated-pack fresh-agent modes with numeric deltas rather than only style changes.
anti_drift.complexity_delta: Fixture adds no runtime complexity; it packages existing evidence into the adaptive creator-run artifact contract.
known_limits: Fresh validation currently ran seed 0 only.
Human/operator review and calibration are still needed before network-absorbable claims.
Network publication remains disabled in this fixture.
The current smoke CLI validates saved evidence semantics but does not recompute source benchmark reports.
